zh: 嬰兒在開始學習坐、爬、站、走等動作時、
en: When babies begin learning to sit, crawl, stand, and walk,

zh: 需要一個清潔、安全的環境、
en: they need a clean and safe environment.

zh: 從活動中增加肌肉關節、
en: Through movement, muscles and joints grow stronger,
and a sense of body awareness develops.

zh: 此時最好能夠給孩子穿輕便的衣褲、
en: Dress them in light, comfortable clothes,

zh: 讓孩子充分在地板上無拘無束地活動肢體、
en: so they can move freely and without restraint on the floor.

zh: 甚至可以把玩具置於活動四周、
en: You can even place toys around their play space,

zh: 誘導孩子伸手或匍匐去拿、
en: enticing them to reach or crawl toward them,

zh: 使孩子得到適當的活動。
en: giving them just the right amount of activity.
